summary: Generation progress, grid rendering, row regeneration, error display, retry behavior, and review-before-publish all worked through the live UI; the only quirk was that the batch run summary stayed failed after per-row retries succeeded.

assertions.details: A 27-user run showed live progress while running, and the progress panel persisted after navigating away to `/studies` and back to the config.
evidence: The runtime config first showed `0/27 synthetic users generated Pending` and later `9/27 synthetic users generated Running`.
After starting another 27-user run on the draft error config, the worker navigated to `/studies` and back; the returned page still showed `Generation Progress 7/27 synthetic users generated Running`.

assertions.details: The generated users grid displayed generated rows with name, axis badges, bio previews, source badges, and statuses.
evidence: The completed runtime config showed rows like `Generated Synthetic User 1` with axis values, a first-person bio preview, `Generated` source, and `Completed` status.

assertions.details: Each generated row exposed a `Regenerate` action, and the row-level loading label `Regenerating...` was observed during an induced offline delay.
evidence: Clicking `Regenerate` on the runtime config queued a regeneration and showed `Synthetic user regeneration queued.`
With offline mode temporarily enabled on the error config, the first row displayed `Regenerating...` long enough to capture the loading state.

assertions.details: With an invalid expansion model override, failed generated users showed explicit error text and a `Retry Failed` control; after restoring settings, retry queued and eventually completed the rows.
evidence: The failed config showed `All 3 synthetic users failed to generate. Failed` and each row displayed `The model `definitely-invalid-model-id` does not exist or you do not have access to it.`
After clearing the override, clicking `Retry Failed` showed `Queued regeneration for 3 failed synthetic users.` and the three rows later returned to `Completed`.

assertions.details: The researcher could inspect generated users in the draft grid before publishing.
evidence: The runtime config remained `draft` while the generated users grid and search box were available for inspection.
Before publishing the runtime config, the grid also showed a manual row and later a transcript-derived row alongside generated users.

commands.observation: Convex returned the updated admin user record for the dedicated validation account.

frictions: After `Retry Failed` regenerated the three failed rows successfully, the `batchGenerationRun` summary on the page still displayed the older terminal `Failed 3/3 processed` state even though the row statuses were `Completed`.
